g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
createOperation(initiator: Actor, grant: Permission.Write, target: Slot, channel: API)
createOperation(initiator: Actor, grant: Permission.Read, target: Slot, channel: API)
Flow: Surge Handling - Multiple Operations Same Slot
createOperation(initiator: Actor, grant: Permission.Write, target: Slot, channel: API)
409 Conflict - All operations must have same permission type
Flow: Equal Arrival/Departure Requests - Double-Booking Prevention
createOperation(initiator: Actor, grant: Permission.Write, target: Slot, channel: API)
Error - Slot already targeted by departure
409 Conflict - Cannot allocate arrival and departure to same slot
